GUIDE

Step-by-step help for newcomers

New to Cardano? These step-by-step guides walk you through everything you need — from finding your wallet address to earning and checking staking rewards.

Wallet & Staking

Find Your Stake Address

Locate your stake address or stake hash inside Yoroi and Daedalus wallets.

Stake or Delegate to a Pool

Delegate your ADA to a stake pool using Yoroi or Daedalus wallet.

Check Your Staking Rewards

See how to view accumulated rewards and track your delegation history.

Governance Participation

Delegate Voting Power to a DRep

Participate in Cardano governance by delegating your voting power to a DRep.
Back to Home
